properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v4 v6 v6 v6 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Undenied Unfailing Undefeated Unchanging All in all Victorious It's the love of Jesus

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For You took the cross When all hope had been lost And no power could stand in the way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Of your love Your love Higher than the heavens Stronger than a thousand seas Your love Your love Constant through the seasons Closer than the air I breathe

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Unrestrained Unrivaled Unashamed Unbridled All in all Invincible God Your love can never fail

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: How great How strong How awesome is our God I stand In awe Of the never failing love of Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Your love Your love Higher than the heavens Stronger than a thousand seas Your love Your love Constant through the seasons Closer than the air I breathe
